assignments.description: assignment for new tier values for the member
assignments.name: Assign_updated_tier_values
assignments.label: Assign updated tier values

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Decision_Table_Failure_First_Attempt
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Decision Table Failure - First Attempt

value.stringValue: Determine Applicable Benefits decision table failure, first attempt.
Failed to update the current tier

assignments.name: Message_Failed_to_Create_Member_Benefits_from_Collection_0
assignments.label: Message - Failed to Create Member Benefits from Collection

value.stringValue: Failed to Create Member Benefits from Collection

value.stringValue: Failed to Create single Member Benefit.

decisions.name: Did_we_find_a_matching_benefit
decisions.label: Did we find a matching benefit

decisions.name: Did_we_find_a_matching_benefit_Single
decisions.label: Did we find a matching benefit Single

decisions.description: What is the event type of this event? Milestone? Tier?
decisions.name: Event_Type
decisions.label: Event Type?

decisions.description: Is the Member achieving a new higher tier, downgrading to a lower tier or staying at the same level. If the latter, no need to create a new member tier record.
decisions.name: What_is_the_Change_Type
decisions.label: What is the Change Type

Flow.description:
US231521 RE Dup Member Benefits: Updated Check for Existing Member Benefits Get element criteria to remove Created Year = Current Year condition. The created year of the TJ is inconsequential.
Adding the logic to maintain the member tier instead of creating a new loyalty member tier record when the tier group is 'PC'
DE115018 - Added a conditional check to update the member tier only when the TJ that is being processed has IHG LOY Program Code as 'PC' to avoid overriding the tier value with the tier value from programs that are not being maintained in Guest SF
Flow.label: LOY - AL - Member Event Handler

recordLookups.name: Check_for_Existing_Member_Benefit_Record
recordLookups.label: Check for Existing Member Benefit Record

recordLookups.name: Check_for_Existing_Member_Benefit_Record_Single
recordLookups.label: Check for Existing Member Benefit Record Single

recordLookups.description: fetches the current tier for the member for which the tier update is triggered
recordLookups.name: Get_current_tier
recordLookups.label: Get current tier

recordUpdates.description: update the current member tier with new values
recordUpdates.name: Update_current_member_tier
recordUpdates.label: Update current member tier

textTemplates.name: UnknownMemberEventType
textTemplates.text: Warning unrecognized Member Event Type: "{!varR_TransactionJournal.Member_Event_Type__c}". Exiting Flow.

variables.description: Set the MilestoneEventType as input to the Decision Table.
variables.name: MilestoneEventType
